title: Cobblemon RIze Tweaks
body:
# A QoL mod for Cobblemon 1.7.0+
### Moi Features(Yay I'm not a bum):
- Jump to a specific PC box by clicking on the Box title while holding Box Jump Key (Default: L Alt) to edit box number. Press Enter to move to specified box.
- Hidden Ability Highlighter in PC and Summary
- Added Scrollable Ability Description to Summary
- Added Scroll function for Summary Info Tabs
- Battle Move Tips
  - Multi Battle Support
  - Custom Types Support (Hopefully)
  - Janky in-battle type changes support via Move logs
    - PS: Will not work if User has multiple active pokemon in battle with the same name
- Added opening Summary from PC (Missed it from CobblemonUITweaks)
- Added Configs with Cloth and Modmenu support
##
